items.description: I want to do a few more of these calls. If your MAX 20x plan ran out of tokens unexpectedly early and you're willing to screenshare and run some prompts through Claude Code please comment. Trying to figure out how we can improve /usage to…

items.title: When you have agents going out and doing work for you, the work just moved up a layer of…
items.title_zh: 当你有代理人出去为你工作时，工作就上升了一层……
items.description: When you have agents going out and doing work for you, the work just moved up a layer of abstraction. Now the work is figuring out what to tell the agent to do, ensuring you give it proper instructions, getting needed context to the agent…
items.description_zh: 当你有代理人出去为你工作时，工作就上升了一个抽象层。现在的工作是弄清楚告诉代理做什么，确保给它正确的指示，为代理提供所需的上下文......

items.title: Attackers can exfiltrate user files from Cowork by exploiting an unremediated vulnerabili…
items.title_zh: 攻击者可以利用未经修复的漏洞从 Cowork 中窃取用户文件……
items.description: Attackers can exfiltrate user files from Cowork by exploiting an unremediated vulnerability in Claude’s coding environment, which now extends to Cowork. The vulnerability was first identified in https://t.co/noHjpUqN1I chat before Cowork e…
items.description_zh: 攻击者可以利用 Claude 编码环境中未经修复的漏洞从 Cowork 中窃取用户文件，该漏洞现已扩展到 Cowork。该漏洞最初是在 Cowork e 之前的 https://t.co/noHjpUqN1I 聊天中发现的。

items.title: Before shipping a product built with AI, the most important step is to think about what f…
items.title_zh: 在推出人工智能产品之前，最重要的一步是思考……
items.description: Before shipping a product built with AI, the most important step is to think about what features you can CUT, not what features you can add
items.description_zh: 在发布使用人工智能构建的产品之前，最重要的一步是考虑可以删除哪些功能，而不是可以添加哪些功能
